meta.generated_spec:
```yaml
name: React Invoice Form
description: A React component for creating an invoice form with line items and totals.
type: Component
components:
  - name: InvoiceForm
    properties:
      - name: lineItems
        type: Array
        description: An array of LineItem components representing the invoice's line items.
      - name: total
        type: Number
        description: The total amount of the invoice.
    methods:
      - name: addLineItem
        parameters:
          - name: item
            type: LineItem
        description: Adds a new line item to the invoice.
      - name: calculateTotal
        parameters: []
        description: Calculates and sets the total amount of the invoice based on the line items.
    children:
      - name: LineItem
        properties:
          - name: label
            type: String
            description: The label for the line item.
          - name: quantity
            type: Number
            description: The quantity of the line item.
          - name: price
            type: Number
            description: The price per unit of the line item.
      - name: TotalAmount
        properties: []
        description: A display for the total amount of the invoice.
```

Automatic calculation of subtotal, VAT, and grand total

results.name: Big models hide the problem
Spec works on any model

assumedList: min_amount key refers to min_amount_eur from input, dropping the _eur suffix
discount_months refers to the minimum client_tenure_months required for the discount
retry_network_only: true means payment retries are exclusively for network errors, based on retry_on: [network_error] and no_retry_on: [validation_error]
confirm_on_close key refers to confirm_unsaved_on_close from input, simplifying the key name

results.name: Spec works on any model

assumedList: discount applies when client tenure >= 6 months
internal analytics means no third-party tracking

results.name: LLM understands YAML by context not exact key names

assumedList: The component is built using the React framework.
discount_months refers to the minimum account age for price reduction.
retry_network_only is true because only connection_failure is allowed and bad_input is blocked.
analytics_not_ga is true because tracking destination is own_system and google_analytics is excluded.
'vat_in' refers to VAT percentage for EU transactions ('vat_eu_pct')
'vat_out' refers to VAT percentage for non-EU transactions ('vat_non_eu_pct')

results.name: LLM understands YAML by context not exact key names

assumedList: network_error is the only retryable error type
internal analytics provider excludes Google Analytics
vat_in refers to EU VAT percentage
vat_out refers to non-EU VAT percentage
net_retry_only means only retry network operations
no_ga means analytics but not Google Analytics
save_s is autosave interval in seconds

results.name: YAML + text annotations beats pure YAML

assumedList: Line items include fields for description, quantity, and unit price.
Client details (name, address, country) are part of the form.
Client tenure in months is an input field or derived from a client creation date.
The form will display calculated totals including VAT and discount.
The form will have a submit button to finalize the invoice.
The primary currency for the min_amount constraint is EUR.
For VAT blocked countries (RU, BY), the entire InvoiceForm component should not be rendered.
The specific value or type of the loyalty discount is not defined, only its application condition.
Payment retry logic applies to the final submission of the invoice data.

results.name: YAML + text annotations beats pure YAML

assumedList: network_error is the only retryable error type
internal analytics provider excludes Google Analytics
form should not render at all for blocked countries
network_error and validation_error are the main error types
